title: Re-enable message deletion, remove all caller checks, and make pinned videos per-user

requirements.text: Remove every caller/principal check from every function in backend/main.mo. This includes any use of 'caller', 'Principal.isAnonymous', ownership guards, or any other access control validation on any function. No caller checks should remain anywhere in the backend after this change.

quotes: No caller/principal checks anywhere — remove all existing caller checks from every backend function, and do not add any new ones.

acceptanceCriteria: No references to 'caller' exist anywhere in backend/main.mo
No Principal-based access control checks exist in any function
All backend functions are callable without any identity or ownership restrictions

requirements.text: Re-enable message deletion on the admin page (frontend/src/pages/AdminDeleteChatroomsPage.tsx or a dedicated admin messages page). Expose a backend function to delete a message by ID with no caller check, and wire a delete button per message in the admin UI so admins can delete individual messages.

quotes: Re-enable message deletion on the admin page

acceptanceCriteria: A backend function exists to delete a message by ID with no caller/principal check
The admin page displays messages with a delete button per message
Clicking delete removes the message from the backend and updates the UI
No caller check is added to the delete function

requirements.text: Change pinned video storage in the backend to be per-user rather than per-chatroom global. Each user's pinned video should be stored keyed by (chatroomId, userId) so that pinning or unpinning a video only affects the calling user's view. Other users in the same chatroom should not see or inherit another user's pinned video. Update the frontend to pass the current user's identity when fetching and mutating pinned videos, and render the pinned video only for the user who pinned it.

quotes: pinned videos are only supposed to be for the current user. Other users shouldn't inherit it
Make pinned videos per-user — each user only sees their own pinned videos

acceptanceCriteria: Pinning a video in a chatroom only affects the pinning user's view
Other users in the same chatroom do not see the pinned video unless they pinned it themselves
Unpinning a video only removes it for the user who unpinned it
The pinned video state is stored per (chatroomId, userId) in the backend
No caller checks are used — user identity is passed as an explicit parameter or derived from an anonymous/anonymous-safe mechanism consistent with the no-caller-check requirement

constraints: Do not modify any pages, functions, or components unrelated to the three specified features
Do not add any caller/principal checks to any function — existing ones must also be removed
Do not change any other backend data models, message structures, or chatroom logic beyond what is needed for these three changes
nonGoals: Adding authentication or login-gating to any feature
Modifying the lobby page, chatroom creation, reactions, or any other unrelated features
Changing visual design or styling of any page other than what is minimally needed to surface the delete button
